name: Greek Mythology RPG
description: This is a text-based RPG set in Greek mythology. Where the Olympian Gods and Goddesses can chose to not or to intervene directly if they wished. Where Mythological creatures exist in Greece. This is where you come in, one who the fates have decided to bless or bring to ruin. Will you end your life as a wandering blind madman or go out in a blaze of glory that will be remembered for thousands of years?
creator: snip22
